---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://imaniallenn1908.shinyapps.io/washfit_app/" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">DATA 555 Dashboard</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>An interactive shiny dashboard created for DATA 555. The dashboard interprets Water, Sanitation, and Hygiene (WASHFIT) assessments done in primary healthcare facilities in the Diamaguene Sicap Mbao commune in Dakar Senegal. </p>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>
